content: Hi Pranjal, nice to connect with you. I'm Keshav, a software engineer with a strong focus on AI and machine learning. I've been working on some interesting projects lately, including building production-grade AI solutions for real-world applications. What brings you to my website today? Are you interested in learning more about my work or perhaps exploring potential collaboration opportunities?
Your name is Pranjal. We just introduced ourselves a moment ago.
